hypothesis: The Bollinger Band touch-and-bounce reversal strategy is effective on XAUUSD M5, with mean reversion occurring after a 3-bar pattern.

long.condition: close > lower_bb(20, 2.0) and close[-1] < lower_bb(20, 2.0) and close[-2] > lower_bb(20, 2.0)

short.condition: close < upper_bb(20, 2.0) and close[-1] > upper_bb(20, 2.0) and close[-2] < upper_bb(20, 2.0)
